title: Derivatives
content: The derivative of a function measures the rate of change. For f(x) = x^n, the derivative is f'(x) = n*x^(n-1).

title: Integrals
content: Integration is the reverse of differentiation. The indefinite integral of x^n is x^(n+1)/(n+1) + C.

title: Matrices
content: A matrix is a rectangular array of numbers. Matrix multiplication combines linear transformations.

title: Mean
content: The arithmetic mean is the sum of values divided by the count. For data [x1, x2, ..., xn], mean = (sum xi) / n.
